items.title: Two killed in light plane crash at Parafield Airport in Adelaide's north

children.content: Two people are dead and a "number of others" have injuries after a plane crash at Parafield Airport in Adelaide's north.

image.altText: Smoke over an airport runway obscuring a hangar.

gallery.altText: Black smoke coming from sheds on the ground

thumbnail.altText: Black smoke coming from sheds on the ground

items.title: Mother who faked 6yo son's cancer diagnosis sentenced to over four years' jail

children.content: A mother who faked her six-year-old son's cancer diagnosis to raise thousands of dollars has been jailed for more than four years for the "cruel, calculated" and "manipulative" crime.

image.altText: A blurred black-and-white photo of a small boy apparently with a bandaged head.

items.title: Long wait for SA upper house result creating 'confusion and uncertainty'

children.content: With less than a week until state parliament resumes, an incoming upper house member says she still cannot access the building or appoint staff because the election result is yet to be declared.

image.altText: A woman with brown hair wearing a blue dress

items.title: High fuel costs a 'kick in the guts' for country clubs, but the game must go on

children.content: Country sporting clubs are rallying to help families keep coming to fixtures as fuel prices double, with some travelling up to 640km. But it's a hefty cost regional and rural families are prepared to take on if it means maintaining their sporting commitments which are so integral to mental wellbeing and social connectivity.

image.altText: Woman with two braids with her daughters aged 12, 9 and 7 in red an black netball uniforms beside the blue court

items.title: Tim Picton's accused killer pleads not guilty to manslaughter

children.content: The man accused of killing former Labor identity Tim Picton outside a Northbridge venue has pleaded not guilty to his manslaughter.

image.altText: Brodie Jake Dewar leaves court flanked by a young woman.

items.title: Hahndorf restaurant destroyed by fire with damage bill 'upwards' of $2 million

children.content: A fire has destroyed a restaurant at Hahndorf in the Adelaide Hills with a damage bill estimated at "upwards" of $2 million.

items.title: Questions loom over LIV Golf's future, but a multi-million dollar course upgrade is playing through

children.content: The Malinauskas government took a calculated risk to redevelop the North Adelaide Golf Course in time for LIV Golf in 2028. It might not pay off.

image.altText: Two men wearing suit jackets in a golf cart with a sign saying ADELAIDE behind

items.title: LIV Golf postpones US event amid tour's uncertain future

children.content: LIV Golf and the US state of Louisiana make a call on the tour's event in New Orleans, which was slated for June.

image.altText: A LIV golf sign at a golf course in Mexico City.

items.title: Evidence of 25-million-year-old platypuses with teeth found in outback

children.content: Researchers have discovered ancient platypus fossils in outback South Australia, where they are believed to have lived with lungfish, flamingos and freshwater dolphins. They also had major a difference from the modern species: well-formed teeth.

image.altText: An artwork showing a brown platypus in green water

items.title: Farmers and authorities on alert as locusts migrate to South Australia

children.content: Multiple locust swarms in South Australia's Riverland region have put farmers and authorities on alert, prompting the South Australian Plague Locust Commissioner to send surveying teams to the region.

image.altText: A person leaning out the window of a vehicle captures a paddock with thousands of locusts

items.title: Baby faces ongoing health concerns after birth delay in regional SA

children.content: A regional South Australian mother who faced a range of stressful diversions during her son's birth says she will always wonder whether his serious and ongoing health concerns were caused by delays in receiving care.

image.altText: Ashton Hurn sits on the grass playing with a baby being held by his mother while a 9yo girl sits nearby

items.title: Doctors fear new hospital design has 'increased risk of death' for women

children.content: Doctors say parts of the proposed design for Adelaide's $3.2 billion new Women's and Children's Hospital raise "significant concerns", including the location of the women's assessment service.

image.altText: A woman with shoulder-length blonde hair and glasses looks ahead.

items.title: Adelaide motorists fined nearly $700,000 at new 40km/h school zones

children.content: The effectiveness of new speed limit signage has been questioned after the RAA revealed 1,100 people had been fined in just over one school term at two new 40km/h zones.

image.altText: Illuminated speed limit sign that says 40

items.title: Mother's impassioned plea after young daughter's cerebral palsy diagnosis

children.content: Ayla doesn't let disability slow her down, but her mother wants her to have the same opportunities as others.

image.altText: A girl in a blue and white dress, with pink glasses smiling while sitting in a park

items.title: Inflation details may give RBA pause for thought on interest rates

children.content: While inflation remains well above the Reserve Bank's target, there are details in the numbers that may give it reasons to hold off another rate hike in May.

articles.title: Headline inflation surges to 4.6 per cent as higher fuel prices bite

children.content: Headline inflation surges to 4.6 per cent in March, but underlying inflation remains at 3.3 per cent.

image.altText: old hand holding cash money notes with a list of bills on a notebook, calculator, glasses, lace tablecloth and cup of coffee

items.title: Rebel Wilson accused of dumping her mobile to avoid handing over key texts

children.content: Ms Wilson's lawyers have previously told Federal Court defamation hearing that her phone was stolen and she was unable to produce all of her WhatsApp message history.

image.altText: Rebel Wilson outside court wearing a green jacket.

items.title: AFL pushes ahead with draft changes and not everyone is happy

children.content: The AFL is pushing ahead with draft and player-movement changes for this off-season, with Carlton president Rob Priestly and Western Bulldogs coach Luke Beveridge criticising the move.

image.altText: First-night draftees from the 2025 AFL draft in their new teams' guernseys

items.title: King's speech to Congress hits on several Trump controversies

children.content: In a speech that was supposed to be apolitical, King Charles hits on some hot-button issues that are fuelling controversies around the Trump administration.

articles.title: Former FBI director charged over alleged social media photo threat to Trump

children.content: Former FBI director James Comey has been charged over a social media photo of seashells that officials say constituted a threat against US President Donald Trump.

image.altText: Comey gestures with both hands as he speaks on a stage.

articles.title: US regulator orders review of TV licence after Trump criticises Kimmel

children.content: It comes after both Donald and Melania Trump demanded the network cancel Kimmel's late-night comedy show over a joke they described as a call to violence, days before an alleged attempt to assassinate the US president.

image.altText: Jimmy Kimmel speaks onstage during the Oscars show, he is dressed in a tuxedo

items.title: What is OPEC? Why is the UAE leaving it?

children.content: The UAE is leaving an international oil-producers' group that has a major influence on the price of oil around the world.

image.altText: A 3D printed oil pump jack in front of the OPEC logo.

items.title: Former police officer loses appeal over assaulting teenagers during arrest

children.content: A former NSW police officer has failed in an attempt to overturn a conviction for using unreasonable force in the arrest of two teenage boys.

image.altText: a man photographed with a camera in his hands, wearing sunnies and suit

items.title: Former Olympic swimming physio to stand trial for alleged child sex offences

children.content: Peter John Wells, 55, pleaded not guilty to one count of sexual assault, and five counts of maintaining a sexual relationship with a child.

image.altText: Peter John Wells in front of a blue wall.

items.title: Ultra-swimmer sets world record with 55km solo feat in crocodile-filled river

children.content: Andy Donaldson took less than 12 hours to swim the challenging 55-kilometre course down the Upper Ord River in Western Australia's north.

gallery.altText: Wasian male swimmer greeted by children at sunset

items.title: Flirtation turns to something much darker in show set at Australian Open

children.content: What starts as a rom-com set at the Australian Open turns into a searing indictment of race relations in Australia in the new show Game. Set. Match.

image.altText: Megan Wilding, an Indigenous woman in her mid-30s, pokes her head through a plastic curtain, looking determined.

items.title: Everything you need to know about this year's winter vaccine rollout

children.content: With winter just around the corner, now is the perfect time to get vaccinated against seasonal flu and other viruses.

image.altText: A nurse puts a colourful bandage on a person's arm.

items.title: What you can do if you are worried about a neighbour's dog

children.content: An unhappy dog doesn't necessarily mean criminal neglect, even if the level of care is below what you would give your own pet.

avatar.alt: Kellie Scott black and white headshot

items.title: Police killer Dezi Freeman had hundreds of child abuse files

gallery.altText: Dezi Freeman pictured outside a court in Wangaratta.

items.title: AI deepfakes are in our schools. What's the right way to handle them?

children.content: Deepfake content, made from artificial intelligence, is increasingly circulating in schools. But what can parents do if their children are the target?

items.title: Melbourne-to-Queensland exodus in 'reversal' amid housing unaffordability

children.content: South-East Queensland has been under-represented in 5% Deposit Scheme approvals, with prospective first-home buyers heading to Melbourne for its "considerable affordability" benefits.

items.title: Airbnb, Stayz face bans under City of Sydney proposal

children.content: A Greens-led proposal passed by the council last night argues the current 180-day cap on short-term rental accommodation is not doing enough to address the rental housing crisis.

items.title: FIFA allows Afghan women's football team to compete

children.content: Afghan women footballers will be able to showcase their skills to the world for the first time in five years after FIFA cleared the way for their return to international competition.

items.title: Head of CFMEU threatened bureaucrats at meeting, inquiry hears

items.title: New course helps teens navigate unique outback driving hazards

children.content: A new defensive driving course being offered in Kalgoorlie aims to equip young motorists with the skills to cope with the unique challenges of outback driving.

items.title: NSW unclear on cost of saving Australia's biggest aluminium smelter

children.content: The NSW government remains committed to Tomago Aluminium but is still waiting to learn how much the bailout will cost.
